input.command: curl -s "https://tokens.coingecko.com/uniswap/all.json" | python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load(sys.stdin); tokens = [t for t in data['tokens'] if t['chainId'] == 8453 and t['symbol'] in ['ETH', 'WETH', 'USDC']]; print(json.dumps(tokens, indent=2))"
